params.account: The address that will occupy the slot
params.depositAmount: Deposit to fund the tax escrow

initialize(address,address,(bool,bool,ad.details: For new slots deployed after the v2 upgrade, initialize + initializeV2      are both called atomically via multicall in the factory.Uses both legacy flag (for pre-upgrade slots) and OZ initializer (for new slots)

multicall(bytes[]).details: Receives and executes a batch of function calls on this contract.

buy(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Buy the slot. `account` becomes the new occupant, `msg.sender` pays.

collect().notice: Flush accumulated tax to recipient (minus module fee if any)

getSlotInfo().notice: Returns complete slot state in a single call

initialize(address,address,(bool,bool,ad.notice: v1 init — called by SlotFactory after beacon proxy deployment

initializeV2(address).notice: v2 upgrade — sets factory for protocol event emission

proposeModuleUpdate(address).notice: Propose a new module (applied on next ownership transition)

proposeTaxUpdate(uint256).notice: Propose a new tax rate (applied on next ownership transition)

setLiquidationBounty(uint256).notice: Update liquidation bounty (immediate, doesn't affect current occupant terms)

topUp(uint256).notice: Top up the occupant's deposit. Anyone can pay.
